name: Strip EQ
explanation: A four-band British console channel-strip equaliser. A low shelf and high shelf bookend two fully swept parametric mid bells (low-mid and high-mid, each with its own gain and frequency), and a sweepable high-pass filter cleans the bottom end before the EQ. Clean, surgical and punchy in the mixing-desk tradition. Controls: Low, Lo-Mid, Lo-Mid Freq, Hi-Mid, Hi-Mid Freq, High, HP and Output.
